title: Theme Standardizer Phase 1 — Extract Shared Package
description: Extract mobile app color tokens from apps/mobile/src/theme/colors.ts into packages/theme/ as @field-ops/theme. Wire mobile app to import from shared package. No visual changes — import-only refactor.

modifications.description: Framework-agnostic color token definitions: ThemeTokens interface, lightTokens, darkTokens, statusTokens, statusTokensDark, getThemeTokens(), getStatusTokens()
Replace local color definitions with imports from @field-ops/theme. Re-export with mobile-specific aliases (ThemeColors = ThemeTokens). Add statusBarBg/statusBarStyle as mobile-only extensions.

doNotTouch.reason: Theme hook — consumes colors.ts exports. Must not change.
Barrel exports — already correct, no changes needed.
Domain types — unrelated to this wave.

integrationChecks.description: N/A — no API changes. Package refactor only.
Verify apps/mobile/src/theme/colors.ts successfully imports from @field-ops/theme. All existing exports (ThemeColors, lightColors, darkColors, etc.) still available.
Verify useThemeStyles.ts still works — imports getThemeColors and getStatusColors from colors.ts which now re-exports from @field-ops/theme.

rollbackPlan.immediate: Revert colors.ts to local definitions. Remove packages/theme/.
rollbackPlan.safeFallback: Mobile app continues working with local color definitions.
rollbackPlan.dataImpact: None — purely structural refactor, no data changes.

selfCheck.step: Run tsc in packages/theme. Verify Expo web export succeeds. Verify colors.ts exports match pre-refactor.

delegation.description: Mayor-direct. Extract tokens, create package, update import.

notes: Phase 1 of Theme Standardizer plan. Import-only change for mobile. No visual differences. packages/theme/ will be consumed by web and docs in waves 151-153.
